---
title: "Projetos"
listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  grid-columns: 1
  grid-item-border: false
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
page-layout: full
---

Projetos em dados, IA, APIs e edge computing.

::: {#projects-listing}
:::
